segments.text: Sonic's got that parabolic recovery arc going
segments.original_text: 放物線を描くかのような挙動をソニックがするんですけど

segments.text: They're catching him really solidly in the air
segments.original_text: それを空中上でねしっかりとがめていますね

full_text: Sonic's got that parabolic recovery arc going They're catching him really solidly in the air Like... Olimar's...
